title: Thimiar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Thimiars''' were small [[Rodent/Legends|rodents]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Shili/Legends|Shili]].

Oftentimes, they found themselves prey to the [[Species/Legends|species]] known as [[Togruta/Legends|Togruta]]. When the Togruta sank their sharpened [[Canine/Legends|canine]] [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]] into the body of their prey, it caused the victim to die quickly yet painlessly. Thimiar were known to have postmortem spasms, giving the impression that it was [[Poison/Legends|poisoned]]. This was the cause of the rumor that the Togruta were venomous, though the Togruta did nothing to dispel this misconception, even taking advantage of the intimidating presence it gave them.

However, one Togruta [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Ahsoka Tano/Legends|Ahsoka Tano]], did not seem to have a taste for thimiars, going as far as saying to her [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Rex/Legends|Rex]], that they made her flatulent.

{{Creature-stub}}
